prompt: We are a cloud software vendor interested in selling to US federal agencies. Explain the FedRAMP authorization process from start to finish, the difference between Agency ATO and JAB P-ATO, and which path we should consider for a first authorization.
assertions: Explains the difference between Agency ATO and JAB P-ATO
Mentions the role of a 3PAO (Third Party Assessment Organization)
Lists the core FedRAMP documentation: SSP, SAP, SAR, POA&M
Explains FedRAMP Ready designation as a precursor step
